steps.title: Protect the main verb
steps.content: The sentence's main verb is bestows. The subject should be Helical swimming, followed by an interrupting modifier about being widely understood to confer stability and efficiency.

steps.title: Avoid extra verbs
steps.content: Choices A and C add finite verbs before the true main verb. Choice B adds the same extra verb and punctuation that breaks the subject from bestows. The blank should leave the subject intact and open the modifier with a comma. The answer is D.
